mapper.sql: s.storage_id, s.equipment_asset_id, e.name AS equipment_name, ea.purchase_quantity, s.storage_location_id, sl.name AS storage_location_name, s.storage_quantity, s.status, s.linked_moveout_id

FROM equipment_storage s JOIN equipment_asset ea ON ea.equipment_asset_id = s.equipment_asset_id AND ea.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN equipment e ON e.equipment_id = ea.equipment_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN storage_location sl ON sl.storage_location_id = s.storage_location_id AND sl.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT storage_id, equipment_asset_id, storage_location_id, storage_quantity, status, linked_moveout_id, created_at, updated_at FROM equipment_storage WHERE storage_id = #{storageId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM equipment_storage WHERE equipment_asset_id = #{equipmentAssetId}
